inputs.label: Patient Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight of the patient in kilograms

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of the patient in kilograms

inputs.label: Drug Concentration
inputs.businessContext: Concentration of anesthetic agent in percentage (g/100mL)

businessContext_i18n.en: Concentration of anesthetic agent in percentage (g/100mL)
businessContext_i18n.de: Konzentration des Anästhetikums in Prozent (g/100 ml)

inputs.label: Desired Dose Rate
inputs.businessContext: Desired dose of anesthetic per kilogram of body weight

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired dose of anesthetic per kilogram of body weight
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vücut ağırlığının kilogramı başına istenen anestezik dozu
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewünschte Dosis des Anästhetikums pro Kilogramm Körpergewicht

inputs.label: Max Safe Dose Limit
inputs.businessContext: Maximum safe dose of the anesthetic without epinephrine (e.g., 4 mg/kg for lidocaine)

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum safe dose of the anesthetic without epinephrine (e.g., 4 mg/kg for lidocaine)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Epinefrinsiz anesteziğin maksimum güvenli dozu (örn. lidokain için 4 mg/kg)
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximale sichere Dosis des Anästhetikums ohne Epinephrin (z. B. 4 mg/kg für Lidocain)

inputs.label: Epinephrine Added
inputs.businessContext: Indicates whether epinephrine is added (1) or not (0). Increases max safe dose by 75%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates whether epinephrine is added (1) or not (0). Increases max safe dose by 75%.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Epinefrin eklenip eklenmediğini belirtir (1 evet, 0 hayır). Maksimum güvenli dozu %75 artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gibt an, ob Epinephrin hinzugefügt wird (1) oder nicht (0). Erhöht die maximale sichere Dosis um 75%.

inputs.label: Volume On Hand
inputs.businessContext: Total volume of anesthetic solution available in the vial

businessContext_i18n.en: Total volume of anesthetic solution available in the vial
businessContext_i18n.tr: Flakonda bulunan toplam anestezik solüsyon hacmi
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtvolumen der verfügbaren Anästhesielösung in der Durchstechflasche

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
